Section II Part B: 4 questions, 60 min, NO calculator

findings.notes: Standard scoring conventions, taught by every AP Calc instructor.

findings.claim: Fundamental Theorem of Calculus Part 1: if g(x) = integral from a to x of f(t) dt, then g'(x) = f(x)
